sales_call.transcript:
Agent: Hi Priya, this is Tara from Acme. Did I catch you at a good time?
Customer: Yes, go ahead.
Agent: I'm calling because you signed up for a demo of our enterprise plan last week. Is that something you're still exploring?
Customer: Yes, very much. We're a team of about 80 and we're outgrowing our current vendor.
Agent: Got it. What's the timeline you're working with?
Customer: Looking to switch within the next 30 days.
Agent: Perfect, I can set up a demo with our enterprise team. Could you confirm the best email to send the invite to?
Customer: Priya at acme dash inc dot com — that's p-r-i-y-a at acme-inc.com.
Agent: Great. Let me get you on the calendar. Are you the final decision-maker on this?
Customer: I'm leading the eval. The CTO signs off, but I'm driving it.
Agent: Understood. I'll send a calendar invite for Tuesday at 11. Thanks Priya!
Customer: Thanks!

support_call.transcript:
Agent: Hi, this is Sam from Acme support. How can I help you today?
Customer: My order ORD-78234 was supposed to arrive yesterday and there's no update.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me check the status. ... I can see it's stuck at the distribution center in Mumbai. I'll escalate this to our logistics team right now.
Customer: Honestly this has happened twice already, I'd really like to speak to a manager.
Agent: I completely understand. I'll get someone from our customer success team on the line.
Customer: Thank you.
Agent: One moment.

appointment_call.transcript:
Agent: Hi! This is Tara from Acme Dental. Are you calling to book a new appointment?
Customer: Yes, I need a cleaning.
Agent: Sure. What day works best for you?
Customer: Thursday?
Agent: Let me check our availability... On Thursday I have 10 AM, 2 PM, or 4:30 PM. Which works for you?
Customer: 2 PM is great.
Agent: Great, 2 PM Thursday. Could you confirm your full name?
Customer: Priya Sharma.
Agent: And the best email for the calendar invite?
Customer: priya at example dot com.
Agent: Booking that now. You're all set for Thursday at 2 PM. The invite is on its way.
